raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee Deetwekti runna Ne-
leetibu/ un tee Sihlneeki ranga
Peerwilschanu/ un runna nelee-
tus Sapnus/ un eepreezina ar
Neleetibu/ tadeht tee maldahs
ka Awis/ tee irr nospatditi/ jo
tur ne bija Gans.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Prett teem Ganneem bija
manna Bahrsiba apskaitufees/
un tohs Abschns efimu es pee-
mecklejs. Bet tas KUNGS
Zebaut peemeklehs farvu ganna-
nu Bulku to Namnu Juhda/
um eezels to ka tatvu ispuschfotu
Sirgu Karra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No winna attahptees tee
Stuhri / Naglas / Karra-
Stohps / un wiſfi Dsinneji
tohpa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee buhs ka tee war-
reni Wihri/ kas tahs Eelas Dub-
kus Ranschanā faminnu / un tee
kaufees/ jo tas KUNGS buhs
ar winneem/ un tee darrihs Kan-
nā tohs/ kas us Sirgeem jahj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es stiprinaſchu to Nam-
mu Juhda/ un atpestischu Jah-
sepa Namnu/ un es eestahdischu
tohs attak/ jo es efmu pahr teem
apscheblojees/ un tee buhs/ ka
buhtu es tohs ne atmettis/ jo es
efmu tas KUNGS winau
Deews/ un paklaustischu tohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee buhs ka weens War-
renajs no Gewräima/ un winno
Girds preezasees ka no Wihna.
Un winno Behrni to redsedami
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es atatzinaschu/ u
pulzinaschu tohs/ jo es gi
tohs tspestiht/ un tee wairo
ka tee zittkahrt wairojahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es tehſchu tohs
teim Laudim/un tee peemin
mannis tahtās Weetās / u
dshwohs ar taweem Behrn
un atgreeſifees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es attveddischu
no Egiptes-Semmes/ un fe
zinaschu tohs no Affirijas/
weddischu tohs eeſtch Gile
Semmi/un Libbanu/ ka pre
winneem Weetas ne taps
atrastas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winch ees za
Juhru tahs Behdafchanas
fitiihs tohs Wilkus Juhra
wiſfn Upju Osiltumi iſiks,
taps ta Lepniba no Afura
gahsta/ un tas Szepteris r
giptes suddihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es stiprinaſchu
eeſch ta KUNGA / un tee
gahs eeſch winna Wahrdā
ka tas KUNGS.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
